title: Memory
subtitle: Control automatic memory generation, usage, and consolidation scope.

basic.title: Basics
basic.description: Control whether new memories are generated and whether consolidated memories are used in sessions.

extraction.title: Extraction
extraction.description: Control which completed sessions are eligible for memory extraction.

consolidation.title: Consolidation
consolidation.description: Control how extracted results are prepared before becoming long-term memory.

generateMemories.label: Generate memories automatically
generateMemories.description: Extract and consolidate reusable memory from completed local sessions in the background.

useMemories.label: Use memories in sessions
useMemories.description: New sessions can read the consolidated memory summary as context.

externalContextPolicy.label: External context handling
externalContextPolicy.description: Choose how memory extraction handles sessions that used web search, web page reading, or similar tools.

minRolloutIdleHours.label: Minimum idle time
minRolloutIdleHours.description: How long a completed session must sit idle before extraction.

maxRolloutAgeDays.label: Maximum session age
maxRolloutAgeDays.description: Sessions older than this many days are no longer considered for extraction. This cannot exceed candidate retention.

maxRolloutsPerStartup.label: Extraction limit per run
maxRolloutsPerStartup.description: Maximum number of sessions claimed for memory extraction each time the memory task starts.

maxRolloutsScanLimit.label: Scan limit per run
maxRolloutsScanLimit.description: Maximum number of completed sessions checked while looking for extraction candidates.

phase1MaxConcurrency.label: Extraction concurrency
phase1MaxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of eligible sessions extracted at the same time.

extractModel.label: Extraction model
extractModel.description: Model used to distill candidate memories from session transcripts.

maxRawMemories.label: Consolidation candidate limit
maxRawMemories.description: Maximum extracted results used in each long-term memory consolidation pass.

maxUnusedDays.label: Candidate retention
maxUnusedDays.description: Unused extracted results older than this many days are no longer consolidated. This must be at least the maximum session age.

consolidationModel.label: Consolidation model
consolidationModel.description: Model used to merge candidates and update long-term memory files.

actions.resetMemoryConfirm: Clear all memory data and memory workspace files? This cannot be undone.

messages.rolloutAgeExceedsRetention: Maximum session age cannot exceed candidate retention
